title: Actually fine
summary: Sometimes the AI just... gets it right. Can you tell — without over-checking?
task: Add a pure helper that capitalizes the first letter of a string.
debrief: This one is genuinely correct — empty-string guarded, pure, and typed. Validation discipline isn't about running everything on everything; it's calibration. A quick type-check or a small test is proportionate here. Over-validating trivial code is its own kind of waste.
